name: Strawberry-Banana Breakfast Treat
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor or blender, combine all ingredients except ice.
2. Cover and blend on high speed.
3. With the machine running, drop in ice one cube at a time.
4. Blend for about 10 seconds or until thick and frothy.
5. Pour into glasses to serve.
Per serving: About 60 cal, 2 g pro, 13 g car, 0 g fat, 0% cal from fat, 1 mg chol, 19 mg sod.
